title: Systems and methods for generating customized ai models
abstract: While AI models, like large language models, are powerful tools with multiple applications, they can be complex to use and can require a lot of resources to operate. The disclosed systems and methods provide tools to generate customized models (or AI agents) that are configured with features like tailored knowledge, capabilities, and instructions that make them faster, more efficient, and using less computational resources. Custom models may offer several technical advantages of improved efficiency, resource use, and connectivity. This disclosure describes systems and methods to configure, evaluate, generate, and deploy the custom models that can more efficiently run specific tasks. Disclosed systems and methods are configured to, for example, receive a query to generate a custom model, generate the custom model with the information in the query, and then resolve user queries more efficiently using the custom model.
claims:
Claims Claims What is claimed is: 1. An artificial intelligence system comprising: at least one memory storing instructions; and at least one processor configured to execute the instructions to perform operations comprising: receiving a query to configure a custom model, the query comprising features, the features comprising a knowledge base and a capability; configuring the custom model based on the features by finetuning a base model with the knowledge base and by generating a set of instructions to configure the capability, configuring the capability comprising establishing connectivity with at least one API or plugin, the at least one API or plugin establishing communication between the custom model and a networked service; generating a custom interface for interacting with the custom model; receiving a user query or prompt via the custom interface; and resolving the query or prompt using the custom model and generating a response via the custom interface. 2. The system of claim 1, wherein: the at least one API or plugin comprises an API associated with a social media account; and the operations further comprise fine-tuning the custom model based on social media information received through the API. 3. The system of claim 1 or claim 2, wherein the features comprise personality instructions, the personality instructions tailoring a tone in the response; and the knowledge base comprises a training library comprising a user-uploaded file. 4. The system of any one of claims 1 to 3, wherein the operations further comprise: receiving finetuning instructions; and updating the custom model according to the finetuning instructions by generating a finetuning dataset that incorporates the finetuning instructions. 5. The system of any one of claims 1 to 4, wherein: the features comprise model-specific instructions; and the operations further comprise: configuring the custom model based on the model- specific instructions; and connecting the custom model with a large language model. 6. The system of any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein the custom model has an assigned memory space in the system. 7. The system of any one of claims 1 to 6, wherein the operations further comprise generating a dashboard displaying metrics associated with processing and memory use by the custom model. 8. The system of claim 7, wherein the dashboard displays computer expenditure of the custom model. 9. The system of any one of claims 1 to 8, wherein the base model comprises a language model; and the features comprise model-specific instructions describing a preferred default response and instructions in trigger I instruction pairs. 10. A computer-implemented method for configuring custom artificial intelligence (Al) model, the method comprising: receiving instructions to create a custom model via at least one of a website, a mobile application, or a first API, the instructions comprising a training dataset; configuring the custom model by finetuning a base model according to the instructions, the base model comprising a large language model (LLM); configuring the custom model to communicate via a second API; generating a custom interface for interacting with the custom model; receiving a user query via the custom interface or the second API; and resolving the query using the custom model and communicating a response via the second API. 11. The method of claim 10, wherein the instructions comprise a capability, the capability comprising one or more of a callback function, an upload/download function, a security function, or a model connector function. 12. The method of claim 10 to 11, wherein the training dataset comprises a plurality of user- uploaded files. 13. The method of any one of claims 10 to 12, wherein the instructions comprise a browsing capability and finetuning the base model comprises establishing an API connection for web browsing; and the custom model comprises performing at least one of: a consumer creator flow, an enterprise creator flow, or an API agent flow. 14. A system comprising: at least one memory storing instruction; and at least one processor configured to execute the instructions to cause the system to perform the method of any one of claims 10 to 13. 15. A system for generating a custom pre-trained custom model, the system comprising: one or more processors configured to perform operations comprising: receiving a query to generate the pre-trained custom model, the query comprising a knowledge base, specific instructions, and a capability; configuring the pre-trained custom model based on the knowledge base, the specific instructions, and the capability by: tuning a base model with the knowledge base and the specific instructions, and establishing connectivity with at least one API or plugin associated with the capability, the at least one API or plugin associating establishing communication between the custom model and a networked service; after configuring the pre-trained custom model, receiving a user prompt; and resolving the user prompt with the pre-trained custom model and generating a response. 16. A system for interacting with a language model, the system comprising: at least one memory storing instructions; 

 at least one processor configured to execute the instructions to perform operations comprising: receiving a query to create an Al agent, the query comprising agent features; configuring the Al agent based on the agent features, the configuring of the Al agent comprising establishing connectivity with at least one API or plugin, the at least one API or plugin associating the Al agent with a large language model; generating an interface for interacting with the Al agent; and deploying the Al agent. 17. The system of claim 16, wherein: the features comprise model-specific instructions and configuring the Al agent comprises configuring the Al agent based on the model-specific instructions; configuring the Al agent based on the agent features comprises connecting the Al agent with the large language model through the at least one API or plugin; and the operations further comprise resolving user prompts sent through the Al agent using the large language model. 18. The system of claim 16 or 17, wherein the Al agent is deployed via at least one of a website, a mobile application, or an application programming interface. 19. The system of any one of claims 16 to 18, wherein the agent features comprise an agent default personality and a training library. 20. The system of any one of claims 16 to 19, further comprising generating a dashboard, the dashboard comprising metrics associated with the Al agent. 21. The system of any one of claims 16 to 20, wherein the operations further comprise: receiving finetuning instructions; and updating the Al agent according to the instructions. 22. The system of any one of claims 16 to 21, wherein: the interface for interacting with the Al agent is a custom interface; and the operations further comprise: 

 receiving a user query or prompt via the custom interface; and resolving the query or prompt using the Al agent and generating a response via the custom interface. 23. The system of any one of claims 16 to 22, wherein: the feature comprising a knowledge base and a capability; configuring the Al agent based on the agent features comprises finetuning a base model with the knowledge base and by generating a set of instructions to configure the capability; and the at least one API or plugin establishes communication between the Al agent and a networked service. 24. The system of any one of claims 16 to 23, wherein the operations further comprise: receiving finetuning instructions; and updating the Al agent according to the finetuning instructions by generating a finetuning dataset that incorporates the finetuning instructions. 25. The system of any one of claims 16 to 24, wherein the Al agent has an assigned memory space in the system. 26. A computer-implemented method for configuring Al agents based on a language model (LM), the method comprising: receiving instructions to initialize an Al agent, the instructions specifying a training data; configuring the Al agent based on the instructions by finetuning a base model; connecting the Al agent with the LM; and resolving queries sent through the Al agent using the LM. 27. The method of claim 26, wherein configuring the Al agent comprises finetuning a base model according to the instructions; connecting the Al agent with the LM comprises configuring the Al agent to communicate with the LM via an API; generating a custom interface for interacting with the Al agent; and the query is received through the custom interface. 28. The method of claim 26 or 27, wherein resolving the queries comprises using the Al agent and communicating a response via the custom interface; and configuring the Al agent comprises performing at least one of: a consumer creator flow, an enterprise creator flow, or an API agent flow. 29. The method of any one of claims 26 to 28, wherein the configuring of the Al agent comprises including a callback function, an upload/download function, a security function, and a model connector function. 30. The method of any one of claims 26 to 29, wherein: the instructions to initialize an Al agent are received via an interface and the instructions comprise a knowledge base; and configuring the Al agent based on the instructions comprises finetuning the Al agent using the knowledge base. 31. A system for generating an Al agent based on a language model (LM), the system comprising: at least one memory storing instructions; at least one processor configured to execute the instructions to perform operations comprising: receiving instructions to initialize an Al agent via an interface; configuring the Al agent based on the instructions; and connecting the Al agent with the LM. 32. The system of claim 31, wherein the interface comprises a chat tab and a configuration tab. 33. The system of claim 32 wherein the configuration tab comprises an instruction section, an action section, and a knowledge section. 34. The system of claim 32 or 33, wherein: the interface comprises an application programming interface (API); and 

 the operations further comprise receiving finetuning instructions via the chat tab and updating the Al agent according to the instructions. 35. The system of claim 34, wherein the operations further comprise communicating with the API via an action section. 36. A computer-readable medium storing instructions which, when executed by at least one processor of a computing system, cause the computing system to perform the method of any one of claims 10 to 13 or 26 to 30.
